top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
JOIN transactions_1k t ON gs.GasStationID = t.GasStationID
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR';

SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
JOIN transactions_1k t ON gs.GasStationID = t.GasStationID
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR';

SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
INNER JOIN transactions_1k t USING (GasStationID)
INNER JOIN customers c USING (CustomerID)
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR';

SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
JOIN transactions_1k t ON gs.GasStationID = t.GasStationID
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR';

WITH EUR_Customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'EUR'
),
EUR_Transactions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT GasStationID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM EUR_Customers)
)
SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
INNER JOIN EUR_Transactions et ON gs.GasStationID = et.GasStationID;

SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
INNER JOIN transactions_1k t USING (GasStationID)
INNER JOIN customers c USING (CustomerID)
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT gs.ChainID
FROM gasstations gs
JOIN transactions_1k t ON gs.GasStationID = t.GasStationID
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR';
